incorrects.description: Student selected 15: confused the difference between Crayons (45) and Markers (30) instead of Glue Sticks and Markers

steps.text: Look at the Glue Sticks bar and the Markers bar. We need to find the difference between those two, not other categories.

incorrects.description: Student selected 55: chose the height of Glue Sticks instead of finding the difference

steps.text: You found how many Glue Sticks there are. The question asks how many more, so we need to find the difference between the two bars.

incorrects.description: Student selected 85: added Glue Sticks (55) and Markers (30) instead of finding the difference

steps.text: Here's a hint: the word more tells us to compare. We need to subtract to find how many more, not add the two amounts together.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Visual shows Glue Sticks bar at 55, Markers bar at 30, with bracket or arrow showing the gap of 25 between them

steps.text: Let me show you how this works. Glue Sticks reaches 55. Markers reaches 30. The difference between 55 and 30 is 25. The answer is 25.
